retrieval.query_summary: Bearish trend continuation setup with HTF alignment and LTF pullback

factors.name: HTF structure aligned
factors.notes: D1 through H1 timeframes are all confirmed bearish, aligning with the short direction.

factors.name: MTF BOS or ChoCH confirmed
factors.notes: A recent CHoCH (2026-04-26 06:00) and BMS (2026-04-26 00:00) are confirmed on the H6 timeframe in the bearish direction.

factors.name: Valid Structural Entry Support
factors.notes: Entry is based on a valid H6 Order Block at [5617.929, 5658.427].

factors.name: Liquidity sweep into entry zone
factors.notes: The bearish leg was initiated by a sweep of the 5690.149 high, indicating a stop hunt.

factors.name: Wyckoff phase supports direction
factors.notes: The structure is indicative of a distribution/markdown phase, supporting a short position.

factors.name: No high-impact news
factors.notes: No event risk data provided; assuming clear calendar as a default pass.

factors.name: Minimum R:R achievable
factors.notes: The setup offers a 1:4.15 R:R to TP3, exceeding the 1:3 minimum for the Intraday style.

factors.name: OTE Entry & FVG Confluence
factors.notes: Entry is within the OTE (71%) of the H6 OB, and an FVG sits just above the OB, strengthening the POI. (BONUS +2)

cot_signal.summary: No COT data available for this instrument.

evidence.content_preview: | 5 | 4H Order Block or FVG at entry zone | MANDATORY | High |

raw_response.explainable_reasoning:
The analysis identifies a high-probability short opportunity on Crash 1000 Index, aligning with a strong, multi-timeframe bearish trend. The HTF context from D1 down to H1 is consistently bearish, with a recent D1 BMS confirming institutional order flow to the downside. While lower timeframes (M30/M15) are in a bullish pullback, this is interpreted as inducement building liquidity before a continuation of the primary bearish trend.

The selected trade is based on a live-edge H6 candidate: a SH+CHOCH+BMS+FVG+OTE+RTO pattern (ID: ...b3289517). The entry is a limit order planned within the H6 Order Block at [5617.929, 5658.427], which is located in the optimal trade entry (OTE) zone (71% retracement) of the impulse leg that broke structure. Confluence is added by an unmitigated FVG just above this OB.

The stop loss is structurally sound, placed at 5705.812, safely above the swing high that initiated the move. Take profit levels target clear downside liquidity pools identified on the D1 chart: TP1 at 5555.013 (recent SSL), TP2 at 5395.022 (D1 Breaker), and TP3 at 5357.275 (major SSL). The setup achieves a 1:4.15 R:R, meeting the strategy requirements.

With a confluence score of 9/10, this setup is graded A+ with high confidence, warranting immediate placement of a limit order.

htf_bias.notes: The overall trend is strongly bearish, with consistent bearish structure breaks from the D1 down to the H1 timeframe. The D1 snapshot confirms a recent BMS to the downside on 2026-04-26, reinforcing the bearish order flow.

mtf_bias.notes: While M30 and M15 are showing a bullish pullback, this is interpreted as a counter-trend retracement. The dominant H1, H3, H4, and H6 structures remain bearish. The LTF bullishness is likely inducement building to sweep liquidity before continuing the HTF bearish move.

evidence.content_preview: SL must be structural — placed beyond the invalidation level of the setup (beyond OB, beyond QML, beyond swing high/low)

stop_loss.reason: Placed above the H6 swing high at 5690.149 that initiated the bearish break of structure, providing structural invalidation.

take_profits.basis: Targeting the D1 swing low from 2026-04-18.
Targeting the low of the D1 Breaker Block from 2026-03-30.
Targeting the major D1 swing low from 2026-04-01.

evidence.content_preview: | 8 | Wyckoff phase supports direction (Spring/Upthrust) | PREFERRED | +1 to score |
